title: GameDevMind: Signal Sniper
objective: Tap only the currently requested blocker nodes on the crowded GameDevMind map, chain clean hits for a multiplier, and avoid striking creative or active-development nodes before three mistakes end the run.

controls.outcome: Clears that blocker signal and adds score

controls.input: Tap two linked nodes in order before the link fades
controls.outcome: Grants bonus points and preserves combo
Lets invalid nodes pass if you are unsure, but missed valid nodes reduce combo

steps: A short voice cue and large top banner announce the current development directive, such as 'Patch Bugs', 'Collect Tools', or 'Index Docs'.
Nodes flood into the screen from all sides as a compact mind-map cluster; only nodes matching the directive get a bright ring, matching icon
Tap valid nodes quickly to build combo; each clean hit briefly clears nearby visual noise so the board becomes easier to read.
Every few seconds, a Signal Flip changes the directive and reshuffles which node family is safe to tap; the whole board flashes the new icon
Occasionally a linked pair appears as a 'Known Solution Path' bonus: tap both connected valid nodes in sequence for a multiplier jump.
The pace and crowding escalate for 2-4 minutes until the player reaches three mistakes from wrong taps or missed hazard overload.
scoring: Each correct tap scores 10 points times combo multiplier. Every 5 clean hits increases the multiplier by +1 up to x8. Tapping a wrong node or missing a flashing hazard resets the combo. Linked 'Known Solution Path' pairs
tips: Read the top directive first; the game is about target identity, not raw speed.
Follow icon plus color together so Signal Flips do not catch you tapping the old target family.
Use risky clusters to hunt linked pairs only when your combo is already high.
Golden light means creative energy: never tap it unless the directive explicitly switches to ideas.

trendContext.title: GameDevMind 最全面的游戏开发技术图谱(Game Development Map)。帮助游戏开发者们在已知问题上节省时间，省出更多的精力投入到更有创造性的工作中去。
